title: AMQP 0-9-1 Model, Virtual Hosts, Exchanges, Queues, and Bindings · Inference Brief: Amqp Error Scope
summary: A diagram sends publishers directly to shared queues, confuses exchanges with storage, ignores virtual-host isolation, and cannot explain how routing keys and bindings produce zero, one, or many destinations. Planned artifact: Add and verify the amqp error scope increment in AMQP entity and routing graph. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Classify connection-level, channel-level, topology precondition, return, confirm, and consumer cancellation outcomes by recovery scope.
Prove unroutable, single-route, fan-out, and overlapping multi-route outcomes with an explicit topology table.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: RabbitMQ and TypeScript Predict Amqp Error Scope · Theory Amqp Error Scope
steps.instruction:
theory case — A theory messaging team handles case 8115 in a quorum queue during a planned rolling maintenance window. Build deterministic TypeScript evidence to derive zero, one, or many queue destinations from exchange and binding evidence; retain duplicate-safe identity through every ambiguous handoff; then raise a broker resource alarm and stop new publisher admission. Browser code models pure messaging decisions only. amqplib, AMQP sockets, RabbitMQ, TLS, partitions, restarts, Docker, databases, external effects, load, upgrades, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Classify connection-level, channel-level, topology precondition, return, confirm, and consumer cancellation outcomes by recovery scope.
